reference: Zanzonico et al. J Nucl Med 40(6):906-915, 1999. Bremsstrahlung dose rates for pure beta emitters.
notes: Dose rate constants for bremsstrahlung from Y-90 beta particles in different container geometries. Values are μSv·h⁻¹·GBq⁻¹·m².

containers.name: PMMA (acrylic) container
containers.description: Syringe or vial in PMMA; standard geometry

containers.name: Lead (Pb) container
containers.description: Shielded in lead; higher atomic number increases bremsstrahlung
containers.warning: ⚠️  Lead increases bremsstrahlung significantly (3–4×) compared to PMMA. Use PMMA or plastic for Y-90 shielding, or accept increased external dose from bremsstrahlung.

containers.name: Tungsten (W) container
containers.description: High-Z alternative shielding (better than Pb for beta)
